title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity and code quality. The video advocates for TypeScript over Python for AI work, citing benefits of LSPs, static type checking, and compile-time error detection that reduce runtime mistakes and improve collaboration on larger AI teams.
